title: Canine Development — independent software-assurance studio
description: Canine Development — an independent software-assurance studio. The open CAI standard, the Watchdog surveyor, and correct-by-construction tooling that make software verifiably world-class.

blocks.heading: We don't build your software. We make sure it's world-class.
blocks.lede: Canine Development is an independent software-**assurance** studio. We don't take build contracts — we build the open standard, the independent surveyor, and the correct-by-construction tooling that turn "trust me" into something anyone can verify.

blocks.heading: The source of truth isn't the code.
paragraphs: Most teams think their codebase is the source of truth. It isn't. The truth is the **WHAT** and the **WHY** — your domain, your rules, your architecture, written down as ADRs and DDRs (Architecture & Domain Decision Records). Code is the **HOW**: an artifact derived from those decisions. And like any artifact, it drifts, decays, and quietly stops telling the truth. That gap — between what the software was meant to do and what the code actually does — is exactly where bugs, risk, and AI slop live.
Assurance is the discipline of measuring that gap — in the open, the same way every time.
**Code is an artifact, not the truth. Our job is to measure whether the artifact still tells it.**

blocks.heading: We work the full arc of software trust.
blocks.lede: From the moment code is written to the moment someone has to stake the business on it.

items.title: Build it right
items.body: The decisions become the software — not a slide deck nobody reads.

items.title: Measure it honestly
items.body: An open 0–100 standard, and an independent surveyor that applies it. Same code in, same score out.

items.title: Govern & prove it
items.body: When evidence has to become governance, the measurements flow on. → Everdue (partner)

blocks.heading: Four products, one standard of quality.

items.title: Unfold
items.body: Describe your business in plain language; get a maintainable, domain-driven .NET codebase that's correct by construction — it compiles, obeys your rules, and passes your scenarios. For the person who knows the business, not the framework.

items.title: Watchdog
items.body: The independent surveyor for C#/.NET. A reproducible 0–100 Codebase Assurance Index across ten lenses, with commit-pinned reports in PDF + JSON. Get the software surveyed before you trust it with the business — you'd never buy a house on the seller's word.

items.title: CAI
items.body: The Codebase Assurance Index — the open, reproducible scoring standard we extracted from Watchdog and gave to everyone. 0–100, 124 public dimensions, ten versioned lenses. Same code in, same score out — verifiable by anyone, with no vendor lock-in.

items.tag: Live · By the makers of Watchdog
items.title: Assay
items.body: Independent software due diligence and appraisal for code you can't read. Assay turns a reproducible Codebase Assurance survey into a decision you can defend — to a board, a committee, or a court. Know what the software is worth before you sign.

blocks.footnote: Watchdog also powers **Everdue**, a governance platform built with our partner consultancy: Watchdog supplies the evidence, Everdue turns it into traceable governance. Everdue is that partnership's product — and its credit.

blocks.heading: "World-class" isn't a feeling. It's ten lenses, scored.

items.title: Always on
items.body: Code Health · Architecture · Maturity · Readiness · Security

items.title: When they apply
items.body: Domain Modeling · Event-Driven · Event Sourcing · Accessibility · Performance

blocks.footnote: 124 public dimensions. One reproducible number. [See the full open standard →](https://cai.canine.dev)

blocks.heading: We don't have opinions about your code. We have a discipline.
blocks.lede: Everything we build and measure rests on the same engineering doctrine.
items: **Domain-Driven Design (DDD)** — model the business, not the database.
**Test- & Behaviour-Driven Development (TDD / BDD)** — prove behaviour before you trust it.
**Vertical Slice Architecture (VSA) + Clean / Hexagonal** — boundaries that survive change.
**ADR + ADL and DDR + DDL** — Architecture and Domain Decisions, written down and kept as a living library, so the WHAT and WHY outlive any developer, framework, or LLM.
blocks.footnote: It's what Unfold builds from, and what Watchdog scores against.

blocks.heading: Raise the floor — and the ceiling — for enterprise software in Denmark.
paragraphs: We started as a consultancy in 2021. We've seen what ships. We'd rather spend the next decade spreading best practice — DDD, TDD, BDD, vertical slices, clean architecture, decisions-as-truth — than write one more bespoke system for hire. So we build the standards and tools that make class-leading software the default, not the exception.

blocks.heading: From consultancy to assurance.
items: **Summer 2025** — **Unfold** is born: correct-by-construction code from plain-language decisions.
**End of 2025** — We stop taking build contracts. Canine becomes an **independent software-assurance studio**.
**June 2026** — We extract **CAI** from Watchdog and publish it as an open standard.

blocks.heading: Assurance isn't a feature we added. It's who we are.
blocks.lede: We're a small Danish team — and half of us do QA. That's not an accident; it's the entire point.

items.title: Independent
items.body: We don't build the software we assess; our only product is an honest measurement.

items.title: Reproducible
items.body: Same code in, same score out. No black boxes, no moving the number.

items.title: Read-only
items.body: When we assess, we measure and advise; we never touch your code.

items.title: Honest about stage
items.body: Live, preview, or alpha — we'll always tell you which.

blocks.heading: Curious where your software really stands?
blocks.lede: Send a note, or start with the independent surveyor.
